top_reviews.review_body: This flash drive is exactly what modern digital life requires. I've used countless drives that slow to a crawl on large file transfers or randomly disconnect, but this one is in a league of its own. It's truly a five-star solution for anyone who needs reliable external storage.The read/write speeds are incredibly fast. Transferring gigabytes of 4K video or massive project folders takes seconds, not minutes. This performance alone makes it worth the price, saving huge amounts of time throughout the workday. It integrates instantly with both my Windows PC and MacBook with zero hassle.Beyond the speed, the reliability and capacity are flawless. The full advertised capacity is available, and after weeks of heavy use, every file remains exactly where I put it. The build quality is excellent—a sturdy, compact casing that feels durable and travel-ready.If you are looking for a flash drive that just works—fast, every time, without fail—this is the only one you should buy. It's the highest quality, most dependable digital storage solution I've found.
Great item. Works well. Price is reasonable. I will buy these again.

top_reviews.review_headline: Inexpensive and work great with Bernina sewing/quilting machines.
top_reviews.review_body: I bought these flash drives to download OESD embroidery design files for use with my Bernina 770QE Plus sewing/quilting machine and Bernina Embroidery Module. THEY WORK VERY WELL. If you are a seamstress and/or quilter then you know that while Bernina machines are some of the finest yet most expensive available, they use many proprietary accessories and they can be quite finicky when it comes to after-market accessories. These 16GB, 2.0 flash drives work perfectly. They utilize an older and slower transfer rate. That said, Bernina machines love them. Shame on Bernina, a market leader in premium machines, for not utilizing the latest technologies when it comes to flash drives like 3.0 and 3.1. They haven’t even adopted the more universal and current USB-C flash drives without you having to purchase an additional USB-A to USB-C adapter. Instead, Bernina would have you to believe you’re willing to fork out $65 plus dollars for their proprietary flash drives. Don’t do it! Buy these and a USB-A to USB-C adapter if necessary to suit your need.

name: Lexar D40E 128GB Dual USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C Jump Drive, USB-C Flash Metal Housing Swivel Design Thumb Drive (Champagne Silver)
description:
USB-C 2-in-1 storage OTG: The Lexar JumpDrive Dual Drive D40E features USB Type-A and Type-C connectors in a slim, portable form factor for easy device compatibility
Transfer speeds up to 100MB/s: Based on internal testing, performance may vary depending upon the host device, interface, and usage conditions. 1MB=1,000,000 bytes
Plug and Play: Widely compatible with USB Type-C smartphones, tablets, laptops, Macs, and traditional Type-A devices, no software installation required. The 360° swivel design allows for easy switching between connectors without the hassle of losing a cap
Durable & Compact: The Lexar D40E USB memory stick features a metal enclosure, withstands temperatures from 0° to 50° C (32°F to 122°F), and is lightweight at 26g with dimensions of 70.4 x 16.9 x 11.7mm
Security & Warranty: Securely protects files using an advanced security software solution with 256-bit AES encryption. Backed by a Lexar 3-year limited warranty

top_reviews.review_headline: Convenient Dual USB Drive That Works Well, But 3.2 Speeds Could Be Better 👍
top_reviews.review_body: I purchased the Lexar D40E 256GB Dual USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type‑C Jump Drive and overall it performs as advertised. The dual connectors (USB-A and USB-C) make it very convenient to move files between newer devices and older computers without needing an adapter. The build quality feels solid, and it works immediately when plugged in with no setup required.Storage capacity is accurate, and for basic tasks like moving documents, photos, and small video files it works reliably. It’s a practical option if you need a simple drive that works with multiple device types.My only real complaint is the speed. Since it’s labeled USB 3.2 Gen 1, I expected slightly faster transfer rates. While it’s definitely quicker than an older USB 2.0 drive, the real-world speeds seem a bit underwhelming for the standard. It gets the job done, but it doesn’t fully feel like it’s taking advantage of the 3.2 capability.Overall, it’s a dependable and versatile flash drive that does what it promises, but if you’re specifically buying it for maximum USB 3.2 performance, you may find the speeds a little disappointing.

top_reviews.review_headline: Perfect Dual-Connector Solution - Fast, Reliable Cross-Device File Transfer
top_reviews.review_body: I picked up this Lexar dual USB drive to simplify file transfers between my phone, tablet, and computer, and it has been an absolute game-changer for myworkflow. The dual connector design with both USB-C and traditional USB-A means I can use it with virtually any device without needing adapters or dongles.The USB 3.2 Gen 1 transfer speeds are noticeably fast - moving large photo and video files that used to take forever now happens in seconds. The 128GBcapacity gives me plenty of room to keep important files, backups, and media readily accessible without worrying about running out of space. The metal housingfeels premium and durable, and the swivel design protects both connectors when not in use while keeping the form factor compact enough to stay on mykeychain.The champagne silver finish looks sleek and professional, and the build quality is exactly what I expect from Lexar. I've been using this drive daily formonths now, swapping files between my MacBook, Android phone, and iPad, and it has performed flawlessly every time. The swivel mechanism is smooth and feelslike it will last for years of regular use. Having instant access to my files across all my devices without relying on cloud storage or internet connectivityhas been incredibly convenient, especially when traveling or working in areas with spotty wifi. The drive runs cool even during extended file transfers, andI've had zero compatibility issues across different operating systems. For anyone who regularly moves files between USB-C and USB-A devices, this is anessential tool that eliminates so much frustration.---

Got this for my Galaxy S25 Ultra. Using it to save videos and free up space on my phone. Tranfers are very easy and quick. The speed is phenomenal and it doesn't heat up like I expected. Easy to carry around and use plus I like that I can easily upload what's on there to my storage drive or computer.At first I didn't think was compatible with my phone but I was gladly surprised once I got it working. Performs very well and I like the overall protection of having to safely eject it before detaching it from my phone. Also happy with the amount of storage it offers. Got it on a slight sale but even the regular price is worth the purchase and I'm a longtime fan of the brand.

top_reviews.review_headline: Be mindful of the larger form factor over SanDisk
top_reviews.review_body: This is a solid product from a solid company, but I have one caveat for those of you that are undecided... I've bought several of the equivalents SanDisk units, and they fit just fine in my cell phone with a bumper case, but the form factor of the lexar unit requires me to remove the bumper case so that I can insert it into my cell phone. Other than that I have no complaints, since it was intended for TV use, but if I want to add anything to it I will still have that issue, and I will be wishing that it was one of the SanDisks! I would have used one of the existing ones I have, but sadly I bought 256 GB units, and the fire TV only accepts up to 128 GB units. If you don't have this issue to worry about, buy it because it is a fine piece of equipment, it's just not nearly as slim as the SanDisks, but it is a bit cheaper, and just as good in my humble opinion. I've used both manufacturers SD and Compact Disc cards in my cameras for years, and I can think of nothing negative to say about either one.

top_reviews.review_headline: Great Drive But Issue With Included Software
top_reviews.review_body: This SanDisk Ultra USB 3.0 Flash Drive works exactly as you would expect it to. Transfers to and from the card seem to work quite quickly. The drive is about standard size, and like many others, has a slide button to slide the USB connector in and out. It also has a blue light that indicates readyness, and transfer activity. The drive is labeled in a way that makes it clear which side needs to be turned up for it to be inserted properly. (I hate drives that you have to try one way, and then the other, because you can't tell simply by looking at them which side should be turned up.) Finally, there is a molded, hole, in the curve at one end, to allow the drive to be carried on a key chain.The one negative I found, which is the reason this is a four-star and not a five-star review has to do with the software on the drive. There is an executable that I believe has to do with drive security. When I ran it, it recognized that there was an update for the program, downloaded the update, but then the update would not run.I paid full Amazon price for this flash drive. I wrote this review just to try to help others learn a little about it. I hope you found this review helpful. On the other hand, if you did not find this review helpful, I’d be interested in hearing why, so that I can attempt to edit it and make it more helpful to both you and others. If you leave a comment on the review, suggesting how it would be more helpful, I promise to respond to your comment, and to attempt to incorporate your suggestion in my review, if it is at all possible for me to do so. My goal is to write reviews that help people, as I have been helped by the reviews others have written. Thanks!
Flash drive got the job done

top_reviews.review_headline: A permanent data transfer medium without monthly subscription
top_reviews.review_body: I have been working as a professional photographer for over 10 years, and I trust SanDisk products. Unlike other brands, their memory cards have never failed me, even after years of use. While cloud storage services are convenient, I still prefer using a USB flash drive for permanent data storage, as it doesn't require a monthly subscription fee.I used the SanDisk Ultra USB 3.0 Flash Drive to transfer a digital wedding album to a client, along with a cloud link. The transfer speed meets the USB 3.0 standard, ensuring a quick and efficient process. The drive is made of ABS hard plastic, which can be susceptible to breaking if dropped or mishandled. It may generate some heat during data transfer, but the plastic design keeps it from getting too hot to touch. I highly recommend this flash drive.
Good one to have.

top_reviews.review_headline: 🚀⭐ Swift, Spacious, Secure: SanDisk 256GB Ultra USB 3.0 Flash Drive!
top_reviews.review_body: 📝 Living in the digital age, we all need reliable, fast, and expansive storage devices. That’s where the SanDisk 256GB Ultra USB 3.0 Flash Drive comes into play. This high-capacity, high-speed device is not just a convenient, but an efficient solution for our ever-growing data storage needs. This small but powerful tech marvel has become an indispensable asset for my digital life, and here’s why:🚀 Unparalleled Speed and Performance: This flash drive delivers consistently fast data transfer rates, whether I’m transferring large multimedia files or backing up critical datasets. The time saved by avoiding slow transfers is invaluable and has significantly improved my productivity.💾 Spacious and Convenient: With an impressive 256GB of storage, this thumb drive accommodates all my files with ease. From high-resolution images and HD video files to important documents and an extensive music collection, it handles them all in its compact form.🔒 Robust Security: What sets this flash drive apart is the SanDisk SecureAccess software. It allows for password-protected files, offering reassurance that even if the drive is misplaced, my files remain secure.💪 Durable Design: The drive’s robust and retractable design protects the USB connector when not in use, ensuring longevity even with heavy daily usage.🔌 Universal Compatibility: The seamless compatibility with multiple devices (PCs and MACs with USB 3.0 ports) results in a smooth, hassle-free experience.🌐 Trustworthy Brand: SanDisk’s reputation as a global leader in digital storage adds an extra layer of trust and confidence in this product.However, one aspect could use some improvement:⏱️ USB 2.0 Compatibility: Though the drive is compatible with USB 2.0 ports, the transfer speeds are noticeably slower with these older ports. Users with older hardware should bear this in mind.In conclusion, the SanDisk 256GB Ultra USB 3.0 Flash Drive is a worthy 5-star contender ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. The blend of fast performance, large capacity, secure encryption, and enduring durability makes it an unbeatable choice. If you’re searching for a high-capacity, high-performance portable storage solution, look no further.Thank you for reading my review, and I hope it helps you in your decision-making process. Happy data storing and transferring! 💽⚡👍

top_reviews.review_headline: 💾 SanDisk Ultra Flash Drive: A Great Project Drive (Not Your Life's Archive!)
top_reviews.review_body: I love a good flash drive—it's the only place I can confidently move all my digital projects and old files without them cluttering up my main computer!This SanDisk Ultra 128GB drive is fast, reliable, and can hold a good chunk of data, but let's be realistic: at 53, 128GB is barely enough to store last weekend's vacation photos, let alone a lifetime of pictures and videos. It's a project drive, not a digital archive!It's the perfect size for backups, moving massive files, or carrying around that one embarrassing PowerPoint presentation from 2005 that you can't bear to delete.😎 Cool/Unaware Fun Fact: The Secret Agent Drive!Did you know you can use this drive to turn any public or work computer into your own private space?You can install an entire portable operating system (like Linux) directly onto this drive.Plug it into almost any computer, boot from the drive, and you get your own personal desktop, complete with your files and settings, without touching or leaving any trace on the host machine!It's a great tool for a man who needs to organize his projects better and access them anywhere. Try that with a floppy disk, Grandpa!

top_reviews.review_headline: Lots of storage in a simple, reliable drive
top_reviews.review_body: This SanDisk drive is an easy way to add a ton of portable storage. It’s compact, works plug-and-play, and transfers files quickly for everyday use (photos, videos, backups). The sliding connector is convenient so you don’t have to worry about a loose cap. Great value if you need a big USB drive for storage or file transfers.

I've purchased a number of SanDisk products over the years and have yet to be disappointed. This is my first purchase of the Flash Drive Ultra and I find the quality and performance to be excellent. Speed is good and well within the benchmarks stated as far as read/write speeds. I'm not real crazy about the thumb open / close mechanism allowing dust or other foreign matter to infiltrate the Male USB port insert, but I guess time will tell. At this price point per drive, I don't really have much to complain about. I generally do a visual inspection of my drives anyhow, so blowing dust particles out or using a Q-tip dipped in Alcohol to remove any debris is simple enough. The instructions are straight forward and easy to understand for even the most untechnical amongst us and the RescuePro Deluxe Software included is a very nice feature for when those magical "OOPS!" moments occur. I think most of us have had at least one occurrence that left us scrambling for data recovery software after a drive was corrupted or an accidental deletion of files and folders that bypassed the desktop Trash Bin. The application comes with both Mac OS and Microsoft compatible versions ready to install from the disk as well as a download link for any additional copies. Registration / Activation is inscribed on an insert inside the drive packaging. Open the drive packaging carefully to keep this vital information from being damaged. A free One-year, Single user License is a pretty decent deal.Photos: 1.) SanDisk 128GB Ultra 2 pack. 2.) RescuePro Deluxe, 1 Year Free W/ Registration Key.

SanDisk is a name that has been around for a while. Good quality. Never had one fail on me. Speed of read and write is good, connector solid. It's small enough to pocket without causing problems. A good design if you need to attach a lanyard. Passes Validrive testing.

top_reviews.review_body: Great and reliable flash drive. I have bought it twice. The reason I didn't give it 5 stars is because it doesn't give you 512GB it gives 460GB. I thought maybe the first time I got it was just a onetime issue but nope only 460. It's weird that I don't see nobody else saying this but you are not getting 512GB. The price keeps going up as well so I won't be buying this size again but SanDisk is reliable so I will get there other sizes. That's my only complaint but great brand everything was solid!

It’s compact, reliable, and handles both everyday file storage and heavier tasks like OS installs with ease. Highly recommend for anyone needing dependable portable storage.

name: 8GB Flash Drive 10 Pack Bulk USB Flash Drives, USB2.0 Thumb Drive USB Stick for Data Storage Backup, Jump Drive Pen Drive Zip Drive Memory Stick with Indicator, USB Storage Flash Drive Swivel Design
description:
10 Pack USB Sticks: 10 pieces of USB flash drives are fit for a variety of scenarios. Whether the flash drives USB are used as school supplies for high school students to backup data storaged in USB jump drives or music USB flash drive for car, zip drive can meet the basic storage needs. USB drive pack of 10 has a higher cost performance. USB flash drive pack of 10 is suitable for ordinary users with appropriate needs, but also for special groups such as companies, schools or other organizations that need a large number of U disks. In short, thumb drives can meet the needs of different customers.
Swivel Design: With the 360° swivel design, all the ports of the thumb drives 10 pack can be hidden inside the metal casing. When needed, simply swivel the casing gently and the ports will automatically expose, making it convenient for you to insert and remove. This design is not only fashionable and beautiful but also more user-friendly, whether you'd like your flash drive for photos, flash drive for video storage, or memory sticks for computers. In addition, the swivel design can effectively protect the interface from damage and pollution, increasing the service life of the flash USB drive.
Portability: The small hole on the thumbdrive USB is designed for lanyards, which is convenient to carry. Besides, the USB flash drive keychain can also be tied through the small hole to prevent loss. This design is very thoughtful and reflects the humanized design concept of the memorias USB flash drive.
Plug and Play: You can use the computer storage flash drive immediately for data storage or backup without any additional installation after inserting it into the computer. This plug and play feature makes the laptop storage drive a very convenient external ssd. You can copy the required data files to the external drive at any time without worrying about computer system compatibility issues. In addition, the design of the external flash drive enables it to be quickly recognized by the system after being inserted into the computer. (NOTE: Please check if your device has a USB-A port before purchasing. If not, a USB-C hub is needed.)
FAT32 format: The default system format for 8GB flash drive is FAT32. FAT32 USB flash drive is widely applicable, such as in televisions, DVD players, vehicles, printers, embroidery machines, etc. Be patient if you have problems with system recognition. It may take some time for initial recognition, but it will happen.
Please Note: 1.Features a standard USB 2.0 interface (typically identified by a black connector); 2.Typical transfer speeds: Write speed: 4–15 MB/s, Read speed: 10–30 MB/s; 3. The drive comes formatted in FAT32, which supports individual files up to 4GB. To transfer single files larger than 4GB, reformat the drive to exFAT; 4. The actual usable capacity will be approximately 90% of the advertised capacity. This is because storage manufacturers use the decimal system (1 GB = 1,000,000,000 bytes), while computers use the binary system (1 GB = 1,073,741,824 bytes). This difference is normal and expected and does not reflect a defective product or reduced storage capability.
Widely Applicable: Compared with other external storage media, take CDs as an example, USB flash disk has obvious advantages in storage capacity, portability, etc., and the sound quality can also reach the level of CDs. Therefore, for modern car audio systems, using disk drives to play music is a better choice. The use of U disk is not limited by network connection, and data transmission and computer storage can be carried out without a network, which is particularly important in emergency situations or unstable network environments.
LED indicator: The end of the USB thumb drive is designed with an indicator. When the light is on, it indicates that the USB disk has been connected to the power supply and can work normally. When the indicator light starts flashing, data is being read or written from the memory USB flash drive. In this case, do not remove the jump drives. Otherwise, data integrity and the service life of the USB drives are affected. This design can help you intuitively understand the working state of the USB stick, so as to better manage and use the memoria USB.
Versatile USB Drives: USB thumb drives are versatile and suitable for a wide range of environments, including schools, homes, offices, classrooms, meetings, business trips, and presentations. They make excellent giveaways at trade shows and are perfect for everyday use. These drives can store various types of data such as music, photos, videos, movies, and other files. Buying USB drives in bulk is a smart choice for graduation gifts, essential college supplies, back-to-school needs, wedding favors, or as portable storage for party events.

I needed a reliable flash drive for moving big files between my work computer and home laptop, and my old plastic USB 2.0 drives just weren't cutting it anymore. I'm so glad I got this one. The difference in speed is night and day. I transferred a few gigabytes of photos and videos in just a couple of minutes, which would have taken forever on my old drive.The metal casing feels really solid and premium, much better than the cheap plastic ones that feel like they'll crack on my keychain. It does get a little warm when you're transferring a lot of data, but I looked it up and that's normal for these metal drives. It's compact, looks great, and the 128GB size is more than enough for what I need. It's a no-brainer for the price.I've been holding onto a trusty (but incredibly slow) 16GB flash drive for years. The time finally came to upgrade when I had to transfer a video file that was bigger than the drive itself! I grabbed this SanDisk Ultra Flair, and wow, what a difference.First off, the speed is fantastic. No more waiting around for what feels like an hour for files to copy. It's plug-and-play, and it just works. The design is also a huge plus. It’s small, has a nice weight to it because of the metal, and looks way more professional than my old plastic one. My only minor gripe is that it's small enough that I'm worried I might lose it, so I put it on my keyring immediately. It's a great piece of tech and makes me wonder why I waited so long to upgrade.

top_reviews.review_headline: Sleek Metal with a Burning Problem
top_reviews.review_body: The SanDisk is a stylish, metal-clad drive that feels far more premium than its budget price tag, offering a reassuring durability that plastic competitors simply lack. For everyday tasks like moving documents or grabbing a movie to watch on a TV, the read speeds are snappy and reliable, making it an excellent addition to any keychain thanks to its sturdy loop. However, that sleek metal casing acts as a heatsink, and it gets alarmingly hot during use—often becoming uncomfortable to handle if you’ve been transferring data for more than a few minutes. This thermal issue isn't just a tactile annoyance; it directly impacts performance, causing write speeds to throttle and crawl during large file transfers as the drive struggles to cool down. It is a fantastic, nearly indestructible option for quick, light tasks, but if you plan on backing up massive folders, patience and a high heat tolerance are required.

top_reviews.review_headline: Large, Legit, maybe not fast, but adequate. Still, Good purchase and recommended!
top_reviews.review_body: Thought the 512GB was a counterfeit. But have proven it's not using simple tools that did write/read testing. For the most part, I got about 50-60MiB/s Write, and around 100-160MiB/s read, sequentially. Formatted (ExFAT/NTFS) it's about 460GB which has provisioning for extra spare blocks to lengthen lifespan and speed. Overall. I give is a 4-stars. 5 for being what they said it is, 4 stars for the slightly slow write speed. This is because the drive is fresh, and this definitely isn't NAND memory. Even TLC NAND is faster, but it may be adequate enough. For my wife, long-term photo storage is what I got it for, and it'll fit. Not only isn't small, but the relative storage size is huge, and cheap, and I can see this used for a lot of trading media or swapping out backups overtime cheaply. It's likely many degrees higher able to survive fires in a fire lock box than a hard drive, and tiny enough to throw on a keychain for imaging with something like ventoy or a quick and dirty linux/windows boot disk. It seems to be of decent sandisk quality, and time will tell, but maybe for a single or dual-disk raspberry Pi server, or even a server intenal boot disk for diagnostics/headlsess server, this is likely a great use for that. it's fast enough for a raspberri pi 4 and small enough to not be a nuisance. also great if you have a car that needs to offload dashcam footage like a tesla or some retrofitted car entertainment systems. It doesn't generate too much heat, even after me running full tests, and can be used as a quick and small OS X bootable disk if you are at a university with a lot of storage space. They seemed to have design some reliability thinking with the spare blocks being reserved, meaning it should last a long time. It should be able to do most file systems, but for FAT32, you may need to create a partition for that, but you can do a lot of 32GB FAT32 partitions if you need to, and reserve the rest for Linux, MacOS or Windows-based filesystems for bootable and other data seperate. Could be used to make a kiosk in public too with right tools while being able to hide it, or pull it quick.

top_reviews.review_headline: Impressive speeds and massive storage for the price
top_reviews.review_body: I am very impressed with this Amazon Basics USB 3.1 flash drive. The transfer speeds are consistently fast, making it easy to move large video files and backups in a matter of seconds. I tested it with several gigabytes of data, and it handled the task without any significant slowdowns.The 256GB capacity is exactly what I needed for my media library and documents. It feels sturdy, and the design is sleek and professional. I haven't noticed any overheating issues even during extended use. If you're looking for a reliable, high-capacity drive for daily data transfers, this is an excellent value!

I picked up the Amazon Basics 128 GB Ultra Fast USB 3.1 drive because I needed something reliable for backing up photos and transferring larger files between my home and work computers. The price seemed reasonable, and I’ve had decent luck with Amazon Basics in the past, so I figured it was worth a try.After a few weeks of use, I don’t really have any complaints. The drive is small enough to toss in a bag or pocket, but not so tiny that it feels like I’ll lose it instantly. It recognized quickly on both my Windows desktop and my older linux system, and transferring files is fast; definitely noticeably faster than the older USB 2.0 drives I’ve used. I’ve been able to move big video files and large batches of photos without much waiting around. No problems with corrupted files so far.The casing is plastic, but it feels sturdy enough for normal daily use. I’m not rough with my stuff, so that’s fine by me. There’s no fancy branding or gimmicks;just a simple, functional flash drive that does what I need it to do. If you’re looking for something basic that gets the job done without costing too much, I think this is a solid choice.

I was looking for an inexpensive higher capacity USB drive to feed a portable projector with videos. Since the videos I was moving to the drive were greater than 4 gig I had to reformat the drive from FAT32 to NTFS on my Windows 11 PC. There were no issues with this using the quick format option. I filled the drive up quickly with a variety of videos at a displayed transfer rate of 180-200 mb/s. The USB-A plugged neatly into my portable projector and was immediately detected, presenting the files ready to be viewed. Access was snappy for a 3.1 device, with no perceivable stuttering or hesitation during playback - even for very large files. The design is typical and the USB end retracts for portability and protection, with no cap to lose. I did not detect any issues like heat or excessive warmth during use. I have used this for a number of weeks on a daily basis with no playback or data loss concerns. Great value for my use case.
Great price, does the job. True to the size. Easy to use, fast speeds.

Bought this as a filler item to get free shipping, and it works fine. It’s a standard, reliable flash drive with plenty of storage for the price.Speeds are decent for daily tasks. It’s perfect for keeping as a backup, whether for media or as a Windows boot drive. Cheap and does exactly what it's supposed to.

Moving 1,000 photos/videos from my computer to the flash drive at once was faster than I expected for a cheaper flash drive. 1,000 photos/videos took between 3-5 minutes depending on amount of videos included in the selection of photos/videos.Zero heat, did not feel like it would randomly explode. Perfect compatibility for USB devices.I highly recommend if you need a cheaper storage solution.Thanks!

top_reviews.review_headline: Reliable, Fast, and Built for Real-World Use!
top_reviews.review_body: The PNY 64GB Turbo Attaché 3 USB 3.0 Flash Drives (Pack of 5) are a perfect blend of performance, durability, and convenience. As someone who transfers large media files and backups regularly, I really appreciate the consistent high-speed performance these drives deliver. The USB 3.0 interface provides excellent read/write speeds — easily handling HD videos, project files, and software installs without lag or stutter.From a technical standpoint, these drives are plug-and-play ready, compatible with Windows, macOS, and even Linux systems. I’ve used them across laptops, desktops, and even audio equipment — zero issues, zero formatting errors. The 64GB capacity is perfect for storing large datasets, presentations, or media collections while keeping everything neatly organized.The silver casing looks sleek and professional, while the sliding connector design protects the USB head without needing a cap (a small but thoughtful feature). Each drive feels sturdy and compact enough for everyday carry — perfect for both IT professionals and casual users.What makes this 5-pack even better is the value and reliability — I can label and assign each one for a specific task (music, work, backups, media, etc.) and trust that my data is safe and accessible every time.If you want dependable, high-speed flash drives that look great and perform even better, the PNY Turbo Attaché 3 drives are an easy choice. Fast, efficient, and built to last!

top_reviews.review_body: The dual-sided USB flash drive is surprisingly practical and solves a common everyday problem: compatibility. With a traditional USB-A connector on one end and a USB-C connector on the other, it eliminates the need to carry multiple drives or adapters. Switching between laptops, desktops, tablets, and even some phones becomes effortless.Performance:Transfer speeds are solid for regular use—quick enough for documents, photos, and moderate-sized videos. If you’re working with extremely large files, you may still notice limitations depending on the model’s read/write speeds, but for general productivity it performs well.Build Quality:Most dual-sided drives feel sturdy, and the swivel or cap-based protection helps prevent damage to the exposed connectors. The compact design makes it easy to carry on a keychain or in a small pouch without worrying about bulk.Convenience:This is the standout feature. Whether you're moving files between old and new devices or sharing data with someone who doesn’t have the same ports as you, the dual-sided design is incredibly flexible. It’s especially useful for students, travelers, and anyone who uses multiple devices daily.Overall:A dual-sided USB drive is a smart, modern upgrade to a standard flash drive. It combines versatility with ease of use, making file transfers and device switching smoother than ever. Highly recommended if you regularly juggle different types of hardware.

top_reviews.review_headline: Exactly What I Needed – Compact, Fast, and Super Versatile!
top_reviews.review_body: I’m really impressed with this flash drive! The dual USB-C and USB-A connectors are a game-changer—it works flawlessly with my laptop, Android phone, and even my friend’s MacBook. No adapters, no hassle—just plug and play.Transfer speeds are great for everyday use. I’ve moved large photo and video files quickly without any lag or errors. The build quality feels solid and it’s small enough to keep on a keychain without being bulky. I also appreciate that it's compatible across all my devices, including Windows and Android.

My daughter needed a USB-C flash drive for school, but we only had regular USB drive devices at home. This JOIOT 128GB dual flash drive was the perfect solution! It has both USB-A and USB-C ends, so she can use it with the school’s newer laptops while we can still plug it into our computers at home.The setup was simple—just plug and play, no extra apps or formatting needed. The transfer speed is very quick (much faster than the older USB drives we’ve used), and the 128GB of storage gives her more than enough space for assignments, projects, and even videos.The design is compact and sturdy, so it easily fits in her pencil pouch without worrying about it snapping. I also like the caps that protects whichever side isn’t being used.Pros:Dual USB-C and USB-A connectors (works everywhere)Fast transfer speedsLarge 128GB storageSturdy, portable designCons:It’s small, so easy to misplace if not kept on a keychainOverall, this flash drive solved our problem and made back-to-school much easier. Definitely recommend it for students or anyone switching between newer and older devices!

Bought a 2 pack to facilitate the transfer of music and picture files between Windows laptop and Iphone 15. Good speed and seems to work well, however, the type c isn't quite long enough to insert into the phone port with the phone cover, so I need to remove that before using it.The 2nd of two in the pack gave me a warning when plugged into the PC USB port and a Norton scan said this brand new drive already contained 67 files in 5 directories, none of which showed up in the directory of same. Works anyway with no issues for my purpose.

top_reviews.review_headline: Perfect Combination of Speed and Convenience!
top_reviews.review_body: I’m thrilled with the JOIOT 256GB USB C Flash Drive! This drive has exceeded all my expectations. The dual USB interface (USB-A and USB-C) makes it incredibly versatile, allowing me to easily transfer files between my laptop, phone, and other devices without any hassle. It’s perfect for both modern USB-C devices and older ones.The 256GB capacity gives me more than enough space to store everything from work files to personal photos and videos. I’ve also noticed the read/write speeds are impressively fast—transferring large files is smooth and quick without any noticeable lag. The drive is compact, lightweight, and feels sturdy, so I can carry it around with ease and without worrying about it getting damaged.

top_reviews.review_headline: Works great with my mac and iPhone!
top_reviews.review_body: Love, love, LOVE that this has both USB-A and USB-C! I just got a new Macbook Air, which only has USB-C and my new iPhone 16 also is USB-C - which is great. The problem is some of my other computers still use USB-A - but this thing works like a champ. It's easily recognized by all my devices and I love that I can easily transfer big files between my old Macbook Pro and my new Macbook Air. I can also plug into my iPhone and copy files on or off. Which will be great on my next trip if I'm worried I'm running out of photo space, I can just dump them on the USB drive - no computer necessary! The drive is formatted in ExFAT - which is broadly compatible, so it'll work on PCs no problem too. The drive itself is sort of plain looking - just smooth black, but it does what it's supposed to do and does a great job of if. Just make sure you don't lost the little caps for each end! Super happy with this little guy.

top_reviews.review_headline: As Expected, Works Well, No Dead Drives
top_reviews.review_body: Decent flash drives. Have no issues so far. Connects fine with laptop on Linux as well as Windows. Storage capacity you get most of the 32GB, maybe 2GB less than average. Durability is plastic so seems a little cheap and not too sturdy, don’t step on it. Write speed and read speed is what other users have posted with their tests. Easy to use and readability is good.

top_reviews.review_headline: Excellent quality and value for a USB flash drive.
top_reviews.review_body: Simply Outstanding in every way. The slider is tight but that is what you need. You push it into a USB port and if it was too loose it would be difficult to make that happen. So 32 gb for three is and outstanding deal. I have larger drives but these are nearly the perfect size for files, music or whatever you want to save on them. Highly recommend. Years ago I only bought Kingston, Mush-kin and Patriot as they were most reliable. Now there is hardly any difference between them.

top_reviews.review_headline: Good drive, tough to use thumb slider
top_reviews.review_body: The three pack of thumbdrives work fine. They come formatted as fat32 which is not great for large files (and with a 64gb drive - large files should be expected). I reformatted one as exfat and one as ntfs without issues. Both of those drives work fine. I connected to a Windows 11 machine, a Linux machine and to an android phone. All could read and write the exfat. The phone does not support writing ntfs, but read it fine.The only complaint I have with the drive is the thumb slider is extremely stiff. You have to press very hard to get the USB connector out (in order to plug into computer) and to retract it. I'm hoping they loosen up over time, but right now, it is the only thing keeping it from a 5 star rating.

High quality and high transfer speeds. Purchased a 3 pack of cheaper usb 3.0 64 gb thumb drives and returned them after finding the speeds were 10% of what they should have been. The Lexar drives met and surpassed my expectations and were worth the extra 3 dollars. Recommend!
Working great, great value

top_reviews.review_body: My laptop started rebooting itself, in the middle of whatever I was doing. I am no computer geek, but I know enough that it shouldn't be doing that. One day, I got a message on laptop, saying that my hard drive may be corrupt. I had no idea of what to do, or why it was corrupt. At this point, the laptop was still turning on, but was taking 5 to ten minutes, to load each screen. Once I got to my program, it would work for a while, then reboot itself... all over again. Due to finances, rushing my laptop in, to the computer doctors, was not a priority. Something told me I better back-up, my 7 years worth of files. Searched Amazon, found this USB flash drive, because it was the cheapest, with decent reviews. The day this flash drive came, I started, painstakingly, copying my laptop files to this removable drive. It took 2 days, and many hours. This was due to only being able to copy so many files, then my computer would restart itself. By now, it's taking almost 30 minutes for me to be able to start copying files again. Each time I got started, I would check the contents of the removable drive. Yup! It was getting copied on the flash drive. I was so happy to see that the flash drive wasn't failing me, in my most crucial time. I couldn't afford to lose years, and years, of stuff. I made it to the last part of copying;which were my photos. Out of thousands, I made it to the last 1500. Anything I copied, more than 700, at a time, would make my laptop restart, taking longer each time it restarted, to do anything. Something told me to just go for it, and copy all 1500 pics at a time. I'm glad I did. At 89% of being complete, the laptop crashed. The next time I turned it on, it said my OS was missing. I wasn't worried about that last 11% of my pics. I had the SD cards, with the original pics on there, laying around the house. I felt so lucky, and excited, that I paid attention to my first mind, and purchase this flash drive when I did. Also, because I was able to literally get everything backed up. I was anxious though, I still had to check and see if all of my info made it on the flash drive...It did!!! This thing was a life saver. Whew!!!

top_reviews.review_headline: Reliable, simple flash drive that does exactly what you need
top_reviews.review_body: This 128GB Aiibe USB flash drive has been a great basic storage option. I needed something affordable and straightforward for transferring files, photos, and documents between computers, and it works perfectly for that.The drive is plug-and-play, so there’s no setup required—just plug it into a USB port and it’s ready to use. It was immediately recognized by my computer, and transferring files was quick and easy. The 128GB capacity gives plenty of room for backups, work files, or even videos.The compact size makes it easy to carry in a bag or pocket, and it feels lightweight but still sturdy enough for everyday use. While it’s USB 2.0, which isn’t the fastest standard available, the speed is perfectly fine for typical document storage and file transfers.Overall, it’s a solid and inexpensive flash drive that does exactly what it’s supposed to do. If you’re looking for a simple way to store and move files without spending a lot, this is a great option.

It’s easy to plug in and use right away, and I haven’t had any issues transferring files back and forth. I’ve used it for documents, photos, and a few videos, and everything has transferred smoothly.The size is convenient, small enough to carry around without worrying about it, but still feels sturdy. The storage capacity is also great for the price, especially if you just need something reliable for regular use.Overall, a solid flash drive that does exactly what it’s supposed to.

top_reviews.review_body: The SanDisk 32GB Cruzer Glide USB 2.0 Flash Drive is a dependable and easy-to-use storage solution. It’s perfect for storing and transferring photos, videos, music, and documents without any hassle. The retractable design is a great feature, keeping the connector protected when not in use.What I Love:✔ Reliable Storage – 32GB is plenty for everyday use, and SanDisk is a trusted brand.✔ Retractable Design – No cap to lose, and the connector stays safe.✔ SecureAccess Software – Includes 128-bit AES encryption and password protection for extra security.✔ Plug-and-Play Simplicity – Works instantly on any device without extra setup.If you need a durable and efficient flash drive for work, school, or personal use, this is a fantastic choice. It’s affordable, well-built, and does exactly what it’s supposed to do.
Works great!

Capacity 256 GB (somewhat less usable real, after format)USB 2.0 interface (backwards compatible with USB 1.1 ports / some USB 3.0)Physical design Sliding mechanism that protects the connector without an extra coverSoftware included in SanDisk SecureAccess with 128-bit AES encryption to protect private filesSanDisk brand guarantee/reputation has quite a bit of recognition in the flash storage market, which gives some confidence in support/quality.---Notable advantages1. Great capacity at a good priceHaving 256 GB on a "plug-and-play" USB device is still very useful for backups, transporting large files, backups, etc. Due to its relative price, it is an attractive option compared to many more expensive models.2. Design without a suitable lid/sliderThe sliding mechanism is useful because it prevents losing caps, protects the connector and is easy to use. Windows Central mentions it as one of the advantages of "Cruzer" in general: "handy sliding mechanism.".3. Reputation of reliabilityMany users report that the device "just works" without early failures, which is important for flash drives. On Amazon, for example, many people can see that it complies to save photos, documents and everyday use.4. Compatibility with older versions of USBAlthough it is USB 2.0, it works on USB 2.0/3.0/previous ports (although limited by speed). This ensures that you can use it even on older equipment.5. Optional securityThe SecureAccess software allows certain files to be protected by password/encryption, which is a plus if you plan to carry sensitive data.

Compact keychain-friendly size survives daily pocket abuse while USB 2.0 speeds handle large files reliably—perfect for backups, presentations, or moving media between non-networked devices. Two-year warranty backs SanDisk quality engineering. Everyday carry staple beats cloud storage hassles!

top_reviews.review_headline: Works, Doesn’t Whine, Moves Data Like a 2009 Hero
top_reviews.review_body: Here’s the deal. These drives do what they’re supposed to do without complaining, which is more than I can say for half the gear on my desk.You get:• Three 32 GB sticks that behave.• Speeds that won’t break land records but also won’t make you stare at the wall wondering where your life went.• Compatibility with older systems that freak out when you hand them anything larger.• A build that feels cheap but survives pockets, drawers, backpacks, and one accidental laundry cycle.SanDisk stays in its lane. They keep things simple and dependable. I’ve only lost a few over many years, and those failures were on me doing something dumb. These drives follow the same pattern: affordable enough, reliable enough, and perfect when you need storage that old machines won’t choke on.Not glamorous. Not fancy. They do the job and stay out of your way.
These are exactly what I wanted and are doing what I need them to do.
Easy to use, holds a lot of information. Good price
Can confirm it works for USB loadergx on the Wii no issues whatsoever also gives the opportunity to run Project Plus with Brawl in the flash drive just don't forget to format to FAT32.

top_reviews.review_headline: Convenient Dual USB Drive That Works Well, But 3.2 Speeds Could Be Better 👍
top_reviews.review_body: I purchased the Lexar D40E 256GB Dual USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type‑C Jump Drive and overall it performs as advertised. The dual connectors (USB-A and USB-C) make it very convenient to move files between newer devices and older computers without needing an adapter. The build quality feels solid, and it works immediately when plugged in with no setup required.Storage capacity is accurate, and for basic tasks like moving documents, photos, and small video files it works reliably. It’s a practical option if you need a simple drive that works with multiple device types.My only real complaint is the speed. Since it’s labeled USB 3.2 Gen 1, I expected slightly faster transfer rates. While it’s definitely quicker than an older USB 2.0 drive, the real-world speeds seem a bit underwhelming for the standard. It gets the job done, but it doesn’t fully feel like it’s taking advantage of the 3.2 capability.Overall, it’s a dependable and versatile flash drive that does what it promises, but if you’re specifically buying it for maximum USB 3.2 performance, you may find the speeds a little disappointing.

top_reviews.review_headline: Perfect Dual-Connector Solution - Fast, Reliable Cross-Device File Transfer
top_reviews.review_body: I picked up this Lexar dual USB drive to simplify file transfers between my phone, tablet, and computer, and it has been an absolute game-changer for myworkflow. The dual connector design with both USB-C and traditional USB-A means I can use it with virtually any device without needing adapters or dongles.The USB 3.2 Gen 1 transfer speeds are noticeably fast - moving large photo and video files that used to take forever now happens in seconds. The 128GBcapacity gives me plenty of room to keep important files, backups, and media readily accessible without worrying about running out of space. The metal housingfeels premium and durable, and the swivel design protects both connectors when not in use while keeping the form factor compact enough to stay on mykeychain.The champagne silver finish looks sleek and professional, and the build quality is exactly what I expect from Lexar. I've been using this drive daily formonths now, swapping files between my MacBook, Android phone, and iPad, and it has performed flawlessly every time. The swivel mechanism is smooth and feelslike it will last for years of regular use. Having instant access to my files across all my devices without relying on cloud storage or internet connectivityhas been incredibly convenient, especially when traveling or working in areas with spotty wifi. The drive runs cool even during extended file transfers, andI've had zero compatibility issues across different operating systems. For anyone who regularly moves files between USB-C and USB-A devices, this is anessential tool that eliminates so much frustration.---

Got this for my Galaxy S25 Ultra. Using it to save videos and free up space on my phone. Tranfers are very easy and quick. The speed is phenomenal and it doesn't heat up like I expected. Easy to carry around and use plus I like that I can easily upload what's on there to my storage drive or computer.At first I didn't think was compatible with my phone but I was gladly surprised once I got it working. Performs very well and I like the overall protection of having to safely eject it before detaching it from my phone. Also happy with the amount of storage it offers. Got it on a slight sale but even the regular price is worth the purchase and I'm a longtime fan of the brand.

top_reviews.review_headline: Be mindful of the larger form factor over SanDisk
top_reviews.review_body: This is a solid product from a solid company, but I have one caveat for those of you that are undecided... I've bought several of the equivalents SanDisk units, and they fit just fine in my cell phone with a bumper case, but the form factor of the lexar unit requires me to remove the bumper case so that I can insert it into my cell phone. Other than that I have no complaints, since it was intended for TV use, but if I want to add anything to it I will still have that issue, and I will be wishing that it was one of the SanDisks! I would have used one of the existing ones I have, but sadly I bought 256 GB units, and the fire TV only accepts up to 128 GB units. If you don't have this issue to worry about, buy it because it is a fine piece of equipment, it's just not nearly as slim as the SanDisks, but it is a bit cheaper, and just as good in my humble opinion. I've used both manufacturers SD and Compact Disc cards in my cameras for years, and I can think of nothing negative to say about either one.

top_reviews.review_headline: Reliable everyday flash drives - solid performance and great value
top_reviews.review_body: I can't believe USB thumb drives are so inexpensive these days! I picked up this 5-pack of PNY 64GB drives mainly for everyday use - transferring files between computers, making backups, and setting up bootable installers. They’re compact, well-built, and have a smooth sliding design that protects the connector without needing a cap (which I always end up losing). At this price point I can give them away without thinking twice.I ran a quick benchmark on my Mac (Apple M4) and got the following results:Sequential Read: ~135 MB/sSequential Write: ~32 MB/sRandom Read: ~6.3 MB/sRandom Write: ~0.04 MB/sFor thumb drives like these you won't be editing files on it - it's mostly for transferring, so sequential read/write performances is more relevant. It's right in line with what I’d expect for USB 3.2 Gen 1 drives in this price range. Real-world file transfers also feel quick and consistent.What I like:- Comes in a convenient 5-pack, perfect for organizing different uses- No caps to lose, just a simple slide to open- Great value for the capacity and speedIf you need a set of dependable USB drives for everyday work, backups, or travel, this is a very solid choice. Nothing fancy, but they do exactly what they should - reliably and at good speed.

I recently purchased the PNY 32GB Turbo Attaché 3 USB 3.0 Flash Drive 3-Pack, and I must say that I am thoroughly impressed with their performance, reliability, and exceptional value. These flash drives have quickly become an essential part of my digital life, and they have exceeded my expectations in every aspect.The standout feature of these flash drives is their lightning-fast speed. With USB 3.0 technology, transferring files has never been quicker. Whether I'm transferring large multimedia files or a vast amount of documents, these flash drives handle the task with remarkable efficiency. The read and write speeds are significantly faster than standard USB 2.0 drives, allowing me to save valuable time and enhance my productivity. PNY has truly delivered on their promise of high-speed performance with the Turbo Attaché 3 series.Furthermore, these flash drives offer ample storage capacity, with each drive providing 32GB of space. This is more than sufficient for storing a vast collection of files, including documents, photos, videos, and even some larger software applications. The compact design of the flash drives makes them highly portable, allowing me to carry them around conveniently and access my files on the go. Whether I need to transfer files between computers, share documents with colleagues, or store important backups, these flash drives provide more than enough storage space.In terms of build quality, the PNY Turbo Attaché 3 flash drives are robust and durable. The solid construction ensures that my data remains safe and protected, even when subjected to everyday use and occasional accidental drops. The retractable connector design is a thoughtful addition, as it eliminates the need for a separate cap that can be easily misplaced. The flash drives also come with a convenient keychain loop, allowing me to attach them to my bag or keyring for easy access.One of the most appealing aspects of the PNY 32GB Turbo Attaché 3 USB 3.0 Flash Drive 3-Pack is the exceptional value it offers. The pack includes three flash drives, giving me the flexibility to use them for different purposes or share them with family and friends. Considering the high-speed performance, generous storage capacity, and the inclusion of three drives, the value for money is truly remarkable.Overall, I highly recommend the PNY 32GB Turbo Attaché 3 USB 3.0 Flash Drive 3-Pack. Whether you're a student, professional, or simply someone who needs a reliable and fast storage solution, these flash drives are an excellent choice. PNY has once again demonstrated their commitment to quality and innovation, delivering a product that combines superior performance, durability, and outstanding value. With the Turbo Attaché 3 series, transferring and accessing your files has never been easier or more efficient.

top_reviews.review_headline: Fast and very functional, a good value
top_reviews.review_body: I picked these up to keep on hand for quick carry of large presentations and the like without worry about where I put "that one drive" last time. These are well constructed, easy to handle, and seem to be protective of the USB-A connector.The transfer speed was quick -- quicker than expected at the price point and allowed me to transfer all my files without issue, even large numbers of small files moved smoothly. I haven't seen any data loss or corruption, not that I expected any, but time will tell the full tale.I appreciate a flash drive that fits well in the USB socket without issue -- even when it's invariably upside down as all USB-A connectors seem to be!Finally, the drive does heat up, as I expected, but the casing makes the heat very tolerable right after transfer. I don't think this is a 'hot' drive, in fact it's a cool tool in my go bag.5/5
Works great.

top_reviews.review_body: Great Value for the Money, Time Saver, Storage Capacity as Described, Compatibility Fits desired needs. The Quality was well built and Packaged Carefully with Protection.I ordered these in an emergency situation; my daughter's computer crashed and I only needed 8GB of space. The most important reason for ordering was the price and time of delivery. At the time 64GB was easier to get than 8GB. Ordering was easy, Customer service and delivery was exceptional. I recieved them a few hours later. They were packaged together side by side in a small Static Free Bag. They weren't easily moved out of the bag which due to possible damage or static discharge from any movement this was great.I inspected the items as they were foldable mounted so as to protect the USB Connection which was another plus on the purchase. I installed the drive, had my Virus Scanner Run a scan before opening it, or allowing it to install or become ready to use on my PC. When it was ready, I Checked the Format on it, all the GB were available without hiccup. I then Formatted it to NFTS as I needed that to Download and Install Windows 11, bootable Rescue Drive. Everything worked as Expected, Space was entirely too big for what I needed it for but, in the event Someone needs that space, it's otherwise Perfect. I double checked the Stability of the drive, ran another Virus Scan on it and then Ejected it.I plugged it into my Daughters PC and It easily Detected the drive and began Installing Windows without errors. Worth every penny and will order this or any larger drive from them again, Thank you it was a timesaver and worked to perfection.

These are functional flash drives. The right speed is quick.The size is compact.They fit my usb port, and I like the design.These are very portable. You should buy a few just to have.You never know when you need them

I purchased a pair of these in 64GB last summer.One was put into use and has been plugged in continuously since that time. For the most part it was flawless but then several weeks ago it began having errors, so I pulled it out and checked it on a laptop and a tablet, both also gave errors.In addition to the read errors I was unable to reformat the thumb drive.I contacted the seller to inquire what the warranty was on these items. The seller offered a refund or a replacement without any hesitation. In fact he refunded the purchase price of the pair even though I was only having trouble with one and he did so without asking for the defective unit to be returnedCustomer service like that is unusual in this day and age and I believe it needs to be spoken about when it occursSo if you are having doubts because this might be a small manufacturer one you might not have heard of I don't think you need to worry he stands behind his products

top_reviews.review_headline: Highly recommended USB drive for fast transfers and reliability
top_reviews.review_body: Super fast and small. I am super happy with these drives. I purchased two 256gbs drives, and they are both exemplary. These work with Mac, Linux, and PC. They are easily and quickly read by these three different operating systems. I highly recommend these at this price point.

This is a great choice for a speedy USB drive, looks slick and reliable. I’ve bought a silver 64GB back in 2019, still works great. Recently bought a Gray 256GB variant, I use it for easy video transfers between devices, and also project files. The Speeds during benchmarking are as expected, ~400MB/s Read speeds and ~100MB/s write speeds, real world performance will vary but performance is high nonetheless. High-value USB drives!

top_reviews.review_headline: Small, durable, dependable and blazing fast.
top_reviews.review_body: I've purchased the Samsung Bar Plus 3.1 USB Flash Drive 13 times between October 2018 and October 2024, including various capacities such as 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, and 256GB. The quality, reliability, and blazing fast performance of these flash drives have been consistently impressive. After four years of heavy use in countless machines, one of the 256GB flash drives stopped working on September 25, 2025. Fortunately, I had just made a backup copy, so I wasn't too worried. Samsung Support was amazing to work with; the representative provided a link to complete the RMA form and assured me that a UPS return label would arrive by email within 48 hours. I highly recommend these flash drives for their quality, durability, outstanding performance and excellent customer service.The attached screenshots from CrystalDiskMark 9.01 are test results of Default, Peak Performance, Real World Performance and Demo test profiles. I’ve also attached a picture of the Samsung flash drive along with the UGREEN USB to USB C Adapter and JSAUX USB C to USB Adapter. Both of these adapters are great!

top_reviews.review_headline: Stylish and Speedy: SAMSUNG BAR Plus 256GB
top_reviews.review_body: I recently purchased the SAMSUNG BAR Plus 256GB USB 3.1 Flash Drive in Champagne Silver from Amazon, and I have been thoroughly impressed with its performance and design.First and foremost, the build quality of this flash drive is exceptional. The sleek, metallic casing not only looks stylish but also feels durable and well-constructed. The Champagne Silver color adds a touch of elegance, making it stand out among other flash drives.In terms of performance, the SAMSUNG BAR Plus delivers impressive speeds with its USB 3.1 interface. I have experienced consistent read and write speeds of up to 400MB/s, which significantly reduces file transfer times, especially when dealing with large multimedia files or backups.The ample storage capacity of 256GB is perfect for my needs, allowing me to store a vast amount of documents, photos, videos, and other files without worrying about running out of space. It's ideal for professionals, students, and anyone who needs to carry a large amount of data on the go.Another standout feature of this flash drive is its compatibility. It works seamlessly with a wide range of devices, including laptops, desktops, gaming consoles, and even some smartphones and tablets. The plug-and-play functionality makes it incredibly easy to use, without the need for any additional drivers or software installations.Additionally, the SAMSUNG BAR Plus comes with built-in security features, including password protection and AES 256-bit hardware encryption, ensuring that my data remains safe and secure at all times.Overall, I am extremely satisfied with my purchase of the SAMSUNG BAR Plus 256GB USB 3.1 Flash Drive in Champagne Silver. It offers a perfect combination of style, performance, and reliability, making it an excellent choice for anyone in need of a high-quality and versatile storage solution.

top_reviews.review_headline: Reliable, however speed is about 1/2 of the reported in specs
top_reviews.review_body: Reliable, physical capacity matches stated in specs.CONS: not as fast (stated 400mbs, benched at 200) write speed (reported 128mbs, benched about 60mbs)Overall good drive and good deal at $20. I've had all kinds/brands of drives over the years .. Sammy drives and cards have never failed .. not one. All other brands have.

You can actually boot an OS such as Linux very well with this USB drive. In my opinion these are great value for the money. I have a few of these and not a single issue, compatible with MS and Linux, no problem. Being versatile with such a large capacity is ideal for most people. If used continuously with extreme loads they will get a little warm, but I had no problem with overheating.
I got this for use as a dashcam storage device in my Tesla. I couldn’t get the smaller model, but this one is still very convenient and feels high-quality.

top_reviews.review_headline: Extremely durable and reliable, but runs hot after extended use
top_reviews.review_body: This USB flash drive is one of the most reliable ones I have ever owned. The metal casing feels premium and provides excellent protection for the storage inside. I have kept one on my keychain and taken it traveling for years, and it has survived almost everything. Once it was even crushed under a luggage trolley wheel and barely had a scratch. Another one has a small dent, but it still works perfectly and plugs in without any issue.Transfer speeds are impressive, especially when reading large files. With speeds up to 400 MB/s, it performs smoothly and consistently. It is advertised as waterproof, shockproof, and heatproof, and most of that seems accurate. The only downside is that it gets very hot after long or heavy use. Despite that, it has never affected performance or reliability in my experience.For anyone who needs a compact, tough, and fast flash drive for travel or daily work, this is an excellent choice. It easily earns its reputation as one of the most durable drives on the market.

top_reviews.review_headline: Highly recommended USB drive for fast transfers and reliability
top_reviews.review_body: Super fast and small. I am super happy with these drives. I purchased two 256gbs drives, and they are both exemplary. These work with Mac, Linux, and PC. They are easily and quickly read by these three different operating systems. I highly recommend these at this price point.

This is a great choice for a speedy USB drive, looks slick and reliable. I’ve bought a silver 64GB back in 2019, still works great. Recently bought a Gray 256GB variant, I use it for easy video transfers between devices, and also project files. The Speeds during benchmarking are as expected, ~400MB/s Read speeds and ~100MB/s write speeds, real world performance will vary but performance is high nonetheless. High-value USB drives!

top_reviews.review_headline: Small, durable, dependable and blazing fast.
top_reviews.review_body: I've purchased the Samsung Bar Plus 3.1 USB Flash Drive 13 times between October 2018 and October 2024, including various capacities such as 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, and 256GB. The quality, reliability, and blazing fast performance of these flash drives have been consistently impressive. After four years of heavy use in countless machines, one of the 256GB flash drives stopped working on September 25, 2025. Fortunately, I had just made a backup copy, so I wasn't too worried. Samsung Support was amazing to work with; the representative provided a link to complete the RMA form and assured me that a UPS return label would arrive by email within 48 hours. I highly recommend these flash drives for their quality, durability, outstanding performance and excellent customer service.The attached screenshots from CrystalDiskMark 9.01 are test results of Default, Peak Performance, Real World Performance and Demo test profiles. I’ve also attached a picture of the Samsung flash drive along with the UGREEN USB to USB C Adapter and JSAUX USB C to USB Adapter. Both of these adapters are great!

top_reviews.review_headline: Stylish and Speedy: SAMSUNG BAR Plus 256GB
top_reviews.review_body: I recently purchased the SAMSUNG BAR Plus 256GB USB 3.1 Flash Drive in Champagne Silver from Amazon, and I have been thoroughly impressed with its performance and design.First and foremost, the build quality of this flash drive is exceptional. The sleek, metallic casing not only looks stylish but also feels durable and well-constructed. The Champagne Silver color adds a touch of elegance, making it stand out among other flash drives.In terms of performance, the SAMSUNG BAR Plus delivers impressive speeds with its USB 3.1 interface. I have experienced consistent read and write speeds of up to 400MB/s, which significantly reduces file transfer times, especially when dealing with large multimedia files or backups.The ample storage capacity of 256GB is perfect for my needs, allowing me to store a vast amount of documents, photos, videos, and other files without worrying about running out of space. It's ideal for professionals, students, and anyone who needs to carry a large amount of data on the go.Another standout feature of this flash drive is its compatibility. It works seamlessly with a wide range of devices, including laptops, desktops, gaming consoles, and even some smartphones and tablets. The plug-and-play functionality makes it incredibly easy to use, without the need for any additional drivers or software installations.Additionally, the SAMSUNG BAR Plus comes with built-in security features, including password protection and AES 256-bit hardware encryption, ensuring that my data remains safe and secure at all times.Overall, I am extremely satisfied with my purchase of the SAMSUNG BAR Plus 256GB USB 3.1 Flash Drive in Champagne Silver. It offers a perfect combination of style, performance, and reliability, making it an excellent choice for anyone in need of a high-quality and versatile storage solution.

top_reviews.review_body: Reliable, physical capacity matches stated in specs.CONS: not as fast (stated 400mbs, benched at 200) write speed (reported 128mbs, benched about 60mbs)Overall good drive and good deal at $20. I've had all kinds/brands of drives over the years .. Sammy drives and cards have never failed .. not one. All other brands have.

You can actually boot an OS such as Linux very well with this USB drive. In my opinion these are great value for the money. I have a few of these and not a single issue, compatible with MS and Linux, no problem. Being versatile with such a large capacity is ideal for most people. If used continuously with extreme loads they will get a little warm, but I had no problem with overheating.
I got this for use as a dashcam storage device in my Tesla. I couldn’t get the smaller model, but this one is still very convenient and feels high-quality.

top_reviews.review_headline: Extremely durable and reliable, but runs hot after extended use
top_reviews.review_body: This USB flash drive is one of the most reliable ones I have ever owned. The metal casing feels premium and provides excellent protection for the storage inside. I have kept one on my keychain and taken it traveling for years, and it has survived almost everything. Once it was even crushed under a luggage trolley wheel and barely had a scratch. Another one has a small dent, but it still works perfectly and plugs in without any issue.Transfer speeds are impressive, especially when reading large files. With speeds up to 400 MB/s, it performs smoothly and consistently. It is advertised as waterproof, shockproof, and heatproof, and most of that seems accurate. The only downside is that it gets very hot after long or heavy use. Despite that, it has never affected performance or reliability in my experience.For anyone who needs a compact, tough, and fast flash drive for travel or daily work, this is an excellent choice. It easily earns its reputation as one of the most durable drives on the market.

top_reviews.review_headline: “Perfect Type-C USB Flash Drive for everyday use
top_reviews.review_body: I am really impressed with the Samsung Type‑C USB flash drive I ordered. The transfer speeds are excellent, and it works instantly with all my USB‑C devices. The build quality feels solid and durable, and the compact design makes it easy to carry. It’s perfect for backing up photos, moving files between devices, or expanding storage on the go. Highly recommend for anyone who needs a fast and dependable USB‑C drive. Great price too!!!

top_reviews.review_headline: Best USB-C flash drive I've found so far.
top_reviews.review_body: I use my phone for video camera work. For context, I bought a 1TB phone specifically because of that. I may take 250-300GB of video in one weekend. MTP is far too pathetically slow method to transfer such large amounts of video from my phone to my PC, and Cloud methods are not really any better. So, for such situations I usually use a portable media device such as flash drive or external NVMe to do the transfer. Copy it from my phone to the flash drive, copy off of the drive onto my PC. Fastest method by far.I have lately been using a NVMe USB enclosure for this purpose, but due to NVMe's (relatively) high power draw, I have to use a USB dongle with power input while making the transfer. Not the end of the world but far from convenient. In the past I have experimented with other USB-C drives, but they've all been far too slow in the write department to be realistic. You may have 300MB/s of read but if your write speed is a paltry 21-22MB/s, you're as good as useless for me. This was the case for the older Samsung USB-A flash drives, and even the newer USB 3.1 gray ones.This one, by contrast, is still not amazing on writes which is to be expected for a traditional flash drive, but it is FAR better than any USB-C drives I have used in the past. On very large transfers (100+GB) it usually settles down to around 75-80MB/s within the first 30 seconds or so, and stays at that speed for the entire transfer. Doesn't get too hot (just warm) and works well.Reads are excellent so far. On Windows I'm getting around 365MB/s continuously. The only real issue with this drive is on very large reads, it will overheat. It gets quite hot on these high speed reads and after around 75-80GB, mine disconnected and stopped the transfer. Thankfully Windows seems pretty good about file management and after it sits for a while and cools down, hitting Try Again seems to work reliably.Overall very happy with this drive. It's pretty darn small for 256GB, and fast enough that I can deal with it for the convenience of not needing to use any dongles.

The great. it's small: unobtrusive, and should plug into a phone or tablet without fuss or extra cables. It's fast and a lot of storage for its size. Worked well with direct plug-in or plugged into a hub.The issues. It's small: hard to grip and unplug, especially if plugged in next to other externals; have to lift up the laptop to get a proper grip. Most important for me (but not necessarily anyone else), it won't directly plug into either an iPhone or iPad with an Otterbox Defender case, because its body is just a bit too wide for the opening, requiring ditching the case (sorry, no), enlarging the case opening (for me, no), or, yep, an extra cable. One star deduction for my situation. Yours may vary.The balance. Excellent for laptop, excellent but not as convenient for this phone/tablet/case combo.
